message:
fix(ci): set PYTHONPATH for integration tests

- ensure repo root is importable for tests and scripts
- resolves ModuleNotFoundError for bio_inspired_nanochat and scripts

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -184,6 +184,7 @@ jobs:
     needs: [build-wheel, python-quality]
     env:
       UV_PYTHON: "3.14.2"
+      PYTHONPATH: ${{ github.workspace }}
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
